LOGIN.TITLE: Sign In
LOGIN.BRAND_DESCRIPTION: Complete hotel inventory tracking from receiving to consumption. Real-time stock levels, automated requisitions, and executive dashboards for hotel management.
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
LOGIN.SUPER_ADMIN_MODE_ACTIVE: Super Admin Mode - Hotel ID not required
LOGIN.ERROR_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
LOGIN.ACCOUNT_INACTIVE_CONTENT: Your account has been deactivated by the administrator. Please contact your manager for assistance.
LOGIN.ERROR_SELECT_TENANT_RETRY: Please sign in again and select a tenant.
LOGIN.SELECT_TENANT_SUBTITLE: Your account belongs to multiple tenants. Select one to continue.

SUSPENSION.TITLE: Access Suspended
SUSPENSION.ORGANIZATION_MESSAGE: Your organization is suspended. You have been signed out. Please contact support or your administrator.
SUSPENSION.ACCOUNT_MESSAGE: Your account is suspended. You have been signed out. Please contact your administrator.

ITEMS.TITLE: Item Master
ITEMS.IMPORT_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Upload a spreadsheet, review validation, then confirm to update Item Master.
ITEMS.IMPORT_HINT: Upload an Excel file using the same columns as the downloadable template. Max 1000 rows.
ITEMS.EXPECTED_COLUMNS_VALUE: Name*, Barcode, Department*, Category, Base Unit, Unit Price + Store quantity columns
ITEMS.IMPORT_AS_OPENING_BALANCE_HINT: Creates stock balance entries for each item's store quantities. Used only during initial system setup.
ITEMS.CLICK_TO_SELECT_FILE: Click to select Excel or CSV file
ITEMS.OPENING_BALANCE_MODE_BADGE: Opening Balance mode - stock entries will be created
ITEMS.INVALID_ROWS_WARNING: {{invalid}} row(s) have errors and will be skipped. {{valid}} valid row(s) will be imported.
ITEMS.OB_IMPORT_REASON_PLACEHOLDER: Enter reason for this opening balance import...
ITEMS.OB_IMPORT_REASON_HINT: Required when importing as opening balance for audit history.
ITEMS.ERROR_OB_REASON_REQUIRED: Please enter an opening balance reason.
ITEMS.ERROR_OB_IMPORT_FORBIDDEN: Opening Balance import is not allowed right now.
ITEMS.CONFIRM_DELETE_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
ITEMS.CONFIRM_TOGGLE_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to {{action}} "{{name}}"?
ITEMS.REQUIREMENTS_WARNING: To create items, please ensure you have at least one: {{missingLabels}}.
ITEMS.OPENING_BALANCE_BANNER: Opening Balance setup is active. Enter opening quantities, then finalize opening balance in Settings to enable GRN and Get Pass.

ITEM_FORM.PAGE_SUBTITLE: Enter item details, base unit, and an optional image.
ITEM_FORM.BASE_UNIT_HINT: Stock is tracked in this unit. Other unit types already linked to this item are kept when you save.
ITEM_FORM.UPLOAD_HINT: JPG, PNG, WebP - uploaded when you save
ITEM_FORM.UNITS_HINT: One BASE unit (rate = 1) is typical. PURCHASE and ISSUE are optional; rates are relative to BASE.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_BASE_UNIT_REQUIRED: Define exactly one BASE unit and select a valid unit for it. Stock depends on this.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_ONLY_ONE_BASE_UNIT: Only one BASE unit is allowed.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_SELECT_UNIT_ALL_ROWS: Please select a unit for all rows.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_POSITIVE_CONVERSION: All conversion rates must be positive numbers.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_LOAD_DETAIL: Could not load full item from the server. Some fields may be incomplete until the request succeeds.
ITEM_FORM.OPENING_COST_PLACEHOLDER: Required if opening quantity is greater than zero
ITEM_FORM.OB_FIELDS_HINT: When opening quantity is greater than zero, an opening balance movement will be created and posted for the default store after the item is saved.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_OB_STORE_REQUIRED: Select a default store to record opening balance.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_OPENING_STOCK_COST_REQUIRED: Cost is required for opening stock
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_OB_COST_REQUIRED: Enter a valid opening unit cost (zero or greater) when opening quantity is greater than zero.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_OB_QTY_INVALID: Opening quantity must be zero or greater.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_OB_MOVEMENT_FAILED: The item was saved, but the opening balance movement could not be completed. You can create an opening balance movement manually from Movements.
ITEM_FORM.ERROR_OB_POST_CANCELLED: The item was saved, but the opening balance document was not posted. You can post it later from Movements.
ITEM_FORM.CONFIRM_OB_POST_MESSAGE: Post this opening balance document now? Stock ledgers will be updated and this action cannot be undone.

MOVEMENTS.TITLE: Inventory Movements
MOVEMENTS.SUBTITLE: Manage receipts, issues, and transfers
MOVEMENTS.POST_SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: You can verify the stock changes on the Stock Balances page.
MOVEMENTS.NO_ITEMS_ADDED: No items added. Click 'Add Line' to get started.
MOVEMENTS.SUCCESS_POSTED: Document posted successfully! Inventory Ledger and Stock Balances have been updated.
MOVEMENTS.CONFIRM_POST_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to post this document? This action cannot be undone and will update stock ledgers.

LEDGER.TITLE: Inventory Ledger
LEDGER.SUBTITLE: Detailed transaction history for all inventory movements
LEDGER.SELECT_ITEM_AND_LOCATION: Select both an item and a location, then load history.
LEDGER.EMPTY_HINT: Post a movement document to create ledger entries.

STOCK.TITLE: Stock Balances
STOCK.SUBTITLE: Real-time inventory levels across all locations
STOCK.NO_RESULTS_WITH_FILTERS: No stock balances match your search or filters. Try different criteria or clear filters to see more rows.
STOCK.NO_RESULTS_EMPTY: There are no stock balance rows to show yet. Post an opening balance or receive stock to see data here.
STOCK.EMPTY_HINT: Try adjusting your filters or post an Opening Balance.

PAR_LEVELS.TITLE: Par Levels
PAR_LEVELS.SUBTITLE: Set min/max/reorder quantities per item per location
PAR_LEVELS.SELECT_LOCATION_HINT: Pick a store or warehouse to load min/max/reorder levels for its stock balances.
PAR_LEVELS.NO_BALANCES_AFTER_LOAD_HINT: There are no stock balance rows for this location yet.
PAR_LEVELS.LOW_STOCK_ALERT_MSG: {{count}} items requiring restocking (at or below minimum level)
PAR_LEVELS.BULK_HINT: Leave a field blank to skip updating it. Changes are not saved until you click Save.
PAR_LEVELS.BULK_NO_ITEMS: No items found for this category in the current location.
PAR_LEVELS.NO_BALANCES: No stock balances for this location.
PAR_LEVELS.NO_BALANCES_HINT: Choose a location above; par levels load automatically.
PAR_LEVELS.FILTER_EMPTY_MESSAGE: No stock balances match "{{name}}" for the current location. Try another category or clear the filter.
PAR_LEVELS.FIX_VALIDATION_TO_SAVE: Fix invalid min/max/reorder values to save.
PAR_LEVELS.RESET_EDITS_MESSAGE: Your edits to par levels will be lost. This cannot be undone.
PAR_LEVELS.VALIDATION_MIN_GT_MAX: Min cannot be greater than max.
PAR_LEVELS.VALIDATION_REORDER_GT_MAX: Reorder point cannot be greater than max.
PAR_LEVELS.VALIDATION_MAX_INCONSISTENT: Max must be at least the min and reorder values.

CREATE.TITLE: New Goods Receipt Note
CREATE.ITEM_SEARCH_PH: Search item by name or barcode…
CREATE.ITEM_SEARCH_DISABLED: Select a supplier first to search items.
CREATE.SUPPLIER_CONFLICT_TOAST: This item is linked to another supplier ({{supplier}}). It was added to this GRN — please verify.
CREATE.NO_ITEMS: No items found. Make sure the item exists in the Item Master first.
CREATE.TEMPLATE_DESC: Required: Item Barcode, Received Qty, Unit Price, Ordered Qty.
CREATE.TEMPLATE_DESC_V2: Columns: Item Barcode (required), Item Name (reference only), Qty, Unit Price.
CREATE.PV_SKIP_HINT: {{invalid}} row(s) with errors will be skipped. {{valid}} valid row(s) will be imported.
CREATE.LEAVE_MESSAGE: You have unsaved GRN lines or attachments. Leave without saving?
CREATE.ERROR_LINES: Add at least one item line.
CREATE.ERROR_INVOICE: Invoice attachment is required (PDF or image).
CREATE.ERROR_PREVIEW: Failed to parse file. Check the format and try again.
CREATE.ERROR_CREATE: Failed to create GRN. Please try again.
CREATE.ERROR_TEMPLATE: Failed to download template. Please try again.
CREATE.ERROR_ADD_INVALID_ITEM_ID: This item cannot be added: missing or invalid item ID.
CREATE.ERROR_ADD_NO_BASE_UOM: This item cannot be added: no base unit (UOM). Configure a base unit in Item Master first.
CREATE.ERROR_LINE_IDS: One or more lines have an invalid item or unit ID. Check "{{name}}" and fix or remove the line.
CREATE.ERROR_EXCEL_LINE_IDS: One or more valid rows are missing a valid item or unit ID. Fix the file and run preview again.

DETAIL.TITLE: Goods Receipt Note
DETAIL.NOT_FOUND: GRN not found or access denied.
DETAIL.LOAD_ERROR: GRN not found or access denied.
DETAIL.REJECTION_BANNER_TITLE: This GRN was rejected — review the reason below
DETAIL.REJECTION_NO_REASON: No reason was provided. Contact the reviewer if you need details.
DETAIL.REVIEWER_EDITED_AFTER_REJECTION: This GRN was edited after a previous rejection. Please verify the updates.
DETAIL.COST_CONTROL_REVIEW_PENDING: Sent to Cost Control for review.
DETAIL.WAITING_FINANCE_POSTING: Approved by Cost Control. Waiting for Finance to Post to Ledger.
DETAIL.EDIT_LINES_HINT: Adjust quantities, prices, or line items to match the feedback, then update. After that, use Resubmit when ready.
DETAIL.CONFIRM_REMOVE_LINE_MSG: Remove this item from the GRN lines?
DETAIL.ITEM_SEARCH_DISABLED_REJECTED: Vendor must be matched to search items. Fix vendor mapping first.
DETAIL.FINANCE_REJECT_MODAL_HINT: This sends the GRN back to Storekeeper / Cost Control. It will not be posted to the ledger until it is reviewed and approved again.
DETAIL.FINANCE_REJECT_REASON_PH: Explain why this GRN is being returned…
DETAIL.CONFIRM_VALIDATE_MSG: Validate this goods receipt note? Line items must be correct before validation.
DETAIL.CONFIRM_SUBMIT_MSG: Submit this GRN for finance approval?
DETAIL.CONFIRM_POST_MSG: This will permanently update stock balances and lock this record. Proceed?
DETAIL.POST_OK: GRN posted. Stock and ledger have been updated.
DETAIL.RESUBMIT_HINT: After correcting the issue, resubmit to send this GRN back for processing.
DETAIL.CONFIRM_RESUBMIT_MSG: This will clear the rejection and set the GRN to pending review (storekeeper) or approved (cost control / admin), depending on your role.

LIST.TITLE: Inter-Store Transfers

LIST.EMPTY_MSG: Create a transfer to move stock between locations.

FORM.NO_LINES: No items added yet. Use “Add Item”.
FORM.PICK_SOURCE_FIRST: Choose “From (Source)” first. Items load from stock at that location (positive quantities only).
FORM.ERROR_LOOKUPS: Failed to load locations or units.
FORM.ERROR_NOT_DRAFT: Only draft transfers can be edited.
FORM.ERROR_LOCATIONS: Both source and destination locations are required.
FORM.ERROR_SAME_LOCATION: Source and destination must be different.
FORM.ERROR_LINE_INCOMPLETE: Each line needs an item, UOM, and quantity greater than zero.
FORM.ERROR_SUBMIT: Saved, but submit for approval failed.

DETAIL.CONFIRM_DISPATCH_MSG: Mark goods as in transit from the source location?

DETAIL.CONFIRM_DELETE_MSG: Delete this draft transfer? This cannot be undone.

FORM.ENTITY_PLACEHOLDER: Enter hotel name, supplier, or guest name
FORM.APPROVAL_FLOW_HINT: This request will go through the following approvals in order:
FORM.APPROVAL_FLOW_STEPS: Department · Cost control · Finance · General Manager

FORM.NO_STOCK_FOR_ITEM: No stock on hand for this item at the selected location.
FORM.NO_ITEMS_IN_LOCATION: No items found in this location.
FORM.SUBMIT_CONFIRM_MSG: The get pass will be saved and sent to the department manager for the first approval step.

FORM.VALIDATION_HEADER: Department and borrowing entity are required.
FORM.VALIDATION_RETURN: Expected return date is required for temporary and catering passes.
FORM.VALIDATION_LINES: Add at least one valid line.

DETAIL.AUDIT_TRAIL_HINT: Who approved each stage (from system records).
DETAIL.REJECT_REASON_HINT: This reason is stored on the record and visible to others.
DETAIL.APPROVE_CONFIRM_HINT: Confirm to record your approval for this step.
DETAIL.CONFIRM_CHECKOUT_MSG: Confirm checkout and deduct stock for this get pass?
DETAIL.CONFIRM_CLOSE_MSG: Close this pass without returning outstanding items?

DETAIL.RETURN_EMPTY: Enter a return quantity for at least one item.

ERRORS.DATE_RANGE: Please select a valid date range.

SUMMARY.VARIANCE_RATIO_HINT: Count variance as % of theoretical balance
SUMMARY.NO_PHYSICAL: No physical count — showing theoretical closing

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Manage your profile and account settings
SETTINGS.ERR_PASSWORD_LEN: Password must be at least 6 characters.
SETTINGS.OB_LOCKED_DESC: Locked — OB import is disabled system-wide.
SETTINGS.OB_OPEN_DESC: Open — OB import is available during initial setup.
SETTINGS.OB_PLACEHOLDER_UNLOCK: e.g. Need to add remaining items…
SETTINGS.OB_ENABLE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to enable Opening Balance? This allows manual stock adjustments.
SETTINGS.OB_ERR_LOCK: A reason is required to lock opening balance.
SETTINGS.OB_ERR_UNLOCK: A reason is required to unlock opening balance.
SETTINGS.OB_ADMIN_ONLY: Only authorized administrators can change the opening balance setting.
SETTINGS.OB_FINALIZE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This runs strict validation, locks opening balance import, and records a snapshot. GRN and Get Pass will be available afterward. This cannot be undone without re-enabling opening balance from an administrator.
SETTINGS.MSG_OB_FINALIZE_SUCCESS: Opening balance finalized. Inventory is now operational.
SETTINGS.OB_FINALIZE_VALIDATION_TITLE: Fix the issues below, then try again.
SETTINGS.OB_ERR_INVALID_COSTS: Items with quantity on hand but zero or negative unit cost:
SETTINGS.OB_ERR_MISSING_BASE: Active items missing a BASE unit:
SETTINGS.OB_ERR_DRAFT_MOVEMENTS: Draft opening balance documents (post or remove them):
SETTINGS.OB_SNAPSHOT_SUBTITLE: Opening balance has been finalized. Import controls stay disabled until an administrator re-opens the opening balance period.

SUPER_ADMIN.NEW_ORGANIZATION_DESC: Create a new organization to manage your hotels and users.

SUPER_ADMIN.EMPTY_TENANTS_MSG: Try adjusting your search or filters
SUPER_ADMIN.EMPTY_LOGS_MSG: Actions will appear here as operations are performed

SUPER_ADMIN.MANAGE_ADMIN_NO_ADMIN: No administrator is selected. Close and try again.
SUPER_ADMIN.EDIT_ORG_MANAGER_HINT: Update the primary manager for this organization. Leave password blank to keep the current password.

SUPER_ADMIN.EDIT_ORG_LOAD_FAILED: Could not load organization details. Showing list data.
SUPER_ADMIN.CONFIRM_SUSPEND_MSG: Suspend "{{name}}"? All active sessions will be terminated.

SUPER_ADMIN.WIZARD_HOTEL_INHERIT_HINT: Managers from the organization apply to this hotel. You do not set a separate password here.

SUPER_ADMIN.WIZARD_HOTEL_ADMIN_SAME_AUTO: The organization manager will be automatically assigned to this hotel.
SUPER_ADMIN.WIZARD_ORG_MANAGER_EMAIL_MISSING: Organization manager email is missing. Choose “New hotel admin” and enter branch admin details, or ensure the API returns the org manager email for this tenant.

SUPER_ADMIN.WIZARD_COMPLETE_SUCCESS: Organization and first hotel created successfully.
SUPER_ADMIN.FULL_ORG_CREATE_SUCCESS: Organization and initial hotel created successfully.
SUPER_ADMIN.DUPLICATE_TENANT_SLUG: This tenant slug is already in use. Choose a different organization or hotel slug.
SUPER_ADMIN.LICENSE_DEFAULTED_FROM_PARENT_HINT: Plan and limits default to the parent organization. You can adjust them if needed.
SUPER_ADMIN.ASSIGN_ORG_MANAGERS_TO_BRANCH: Assign organization managers to this branch
SUPER_ADMIN.ASSIGN_ORG_MANAGERS_TO_BRANCH_HINT: When enabled, users with organization-level manager access are also granted access to this branch.
SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_ADMIN_EMAIL_SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Type email to search or add new…

SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_EXISTING_USER_HINT_BRANCH: User found. They will be assigned as ADMIN for this hotel/branch.
SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_SLUG_HINT: Unique ID — auto-generated from name, cannot be changed later
SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_LICENSE_DATE_RANGE_INVALID: End date must be after start date
SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_ADMIN_DESC: This person becomes the initial manager or admin for the new tenant. Search by email to link an existing user, or enter a new address to create an account.
SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_HINT: Share this with the hotel admin — they can change it after first login
SUPER_ADMIN.ERROR_BRANCH_LIMIT_REACHED: Branch limit reached for this parent.
SUPER_ADMIN.CREATE_PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters.
